name: Savoury Mashed Sweet Potato Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweet potatoes for 20 to 30 minutes or until tender. Drain and peel while still warm.
2. Mash the sweet potatoes.
3. Mix in all the remaining ingredients except the ghee. Knead thoroughly until blended.
4. Divide into 8 portions.
5. Wash and dry hands, then rub with oil. Roll each ball between your hands and flatten into patties.
6. Brush patties with ghee on a griddle or skillet. Over the lowest heat possible, heat the ghee and fry the patties for 15 to 20 minutes per side until a crisp reddish-brown crust forms.
7. Serve hot.
